title: Write ferrum_extlib_app.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_app: application lifecycle, window management, system integration. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: app lifecycle (init/run/quit), window management via xdg-shell, system notifications (libnotify / D-Bus), file pickers via XDG Desktop Portal, system menus, macOS NSApp/NSMenu integration, Windows HWND integration, multi-window support, sandboxed-friendly API.
